---
title: ""
page-layout: full
sidebar: false
format:
  html:
    theme: flatly
    toc: false
    smooth-scroll: true
---

<style>

/* GENERAL */

body {
  background-color: #f8fafc;
  font-family: "Segoe UI", sans-serif;
}

/* HERO SECTION */

.hero-container {
  height: 90vh;
  border-radius: 30px;
  overflow: hidden;
  margin-bottom: 4rem;

  background:
    linear-gradient(rgba(15,23,42,0.82), rgba(15,23,42,0.82)),
    url("https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1523050854058-8df90110c9f1?q=80&w=2070&auto=format&fit=crop");

  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;

  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}

.hero-content {
  max-width: 900px;
  color: white;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 2rem;
}

.hero-content h1 {
  font-size: 5rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.hero-content h2 {
  font-size: 2rem;
  font-weight: 300;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}

.hero-content p {
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  line-height: 1.8;
  opacity: 0.9;
}

.hero-buttons {
  margin-top: 2rem;
}

.hero-btn {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 14px 28px;
  border-radius: 14px;
  background: white;
  color: #0f172a;
  text-decoration: none;
  font-weight: 600;
  margin: 0 10px;
  transition: 0.3s ease;
}

.hero-btn:hover {
  transform: translateY(-4px);
}

.secondary-btn {
  background: transparent;
  border: 2px solid white;
  color: white;
}

/* STATS SECTION */

.stats-section {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 1.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 4rem;
}

.stat-box {
  background: white;
  padding: 2rem;
  border-radius: 24px;
  text-align: center;
  box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
}

.stat-number {
  font-size: 2.5rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #0f172a;
}

.stat-label {
  margin-top: 0.5rem;
  color: #64748b;
  font-size: 1rem;
}

/* CONTENT CARDS */

.content-card {
  background: white;
  padding: 3rem;
  border-radius: 28px;
  margin-bottom: 3rem;
  box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
}

.content-card h2 {
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #0f172a;
}

.content-card p,
.content-card li {
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  line-height: 1.9;
  color: #334155;
}

/* DARK SECTION */

.dark-section {
  background: #0f172a;
  color: white;
  padding: 3rem;
  border-radius: 28px;
  margin-bottom: 3rem;
}

.dark-section h2 {
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

.dark-section li {
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  font-size: 1.1rem;
}

/* FOOTER NAVIGATION */

.nav-links {
  text-align: center;
  margin-top: 2rem;
}

.nav-links a {
  text-decoration: none;
  font-weight: 600;
  margin: 0 1rem;
  color: #0f172a;
}

</style>

<div class="hero-container">

<div class="hero-content">

# Decoding Higher Education

## A Trend Analysis of Industrial Engineering Programs in Turkey

<p>
Understanding the hidden drivers behind student demand, university prestige, and regional educational dynamics through data analytics.
</p>

<div class="hero-buttons">

<a href="analysis.html" class="hero-btn">
Explore Analysis
</a>

<a href="data.html" class="hero-btn secondary-btn">
View Dataset
</a>

</div>

<br><br>

### Team Let It Happen

Yusuf Bora Çavdar · Onur Furkan Gök

</div>

</div>

<div class="stats-section">

<div class="stat-box">
<div class="stat-number">2018–2024</div>
<div class="stat-label">Years Analyzed</div>
</div>

<div class="stat-box">
<div class="stat-number">100+</div>
<div class="stat-label">IE Programs</div>
</div>

<div class="stat-box">
<div class="stat-number">81</div>
<div class="stat-label">Cities Covered</div>
</div>

<div class="stat-box">
<div class="stat-number">Multi</div>
<div class="stat-label">Integrated Sources</div>
</div>

</div>

<div class="content-card">

## Project Overview

Industrial Engineering programs in Turkey exhibit significant differences in popularity, student demand, and ranking performance. However, raw placement statistics alone often fail to explain why certain universities consistently outperform others.

This project investigates the evolution of Industrial Engineering departments between 2018 and 2024 by combining official placement statistics, demand indicators, and regional characteristics.

Using R and Quarto, we apply data analytics techniques to explore how geographical location, quota structures, and demand intensity relate to departmental success and national visibility.

</div>

<div class="dark-section">

## Research Questions

- What factors influence the popularity of Industrial Engineering departments in Turkey?
- Do metropolitan universities dominate student demand?
- How does demand-to-quota ratio affect ranking performance?
- Which universities demonstrate the strongest upward trends over time?
- Are regional patterns observable across the Turkish higher education landscape?

</div>

<div class="content-card">

## Methodology Overview

This project combines modern data analytics workflows with reproducible research practices.

### Analytical Pipeline

- Data extraction using the `thestats` R package
- Integration of YÖK Atlas and supplementary datasets
- Data cleaning and preprocessing in R
- Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA)
- Correlation and trend analysis
- Statistical modeling and visualization through Quarto

</div>

<div class="content-card">

## Key Takeaways

- Metropolitan universities consistently dominate ranking performance and student demand.
- Demand-to-quota ratio appears strongly associated with national success rankings.
- Several Anatolian universities demonstrate rapid upward trends after 2021.
- Regional disparities continue to shape Industrial Engineering education patterns in Turkey.
- Data-driven approaches provide deeper insight beyond raw placement statistics.

</div>

<div class="content-card">

## Explore the Project

<div class="nav-links">

<a href="data.html">Data Page</a>

<a href="analysis.html">Analysis Page</a>

</div>

</div>

<div class="contributors-section">

<div class="contributors-header">

<div class="contributors-tag">
Research Team
</div>

<h2>
Project Contributors
</h2>

<p>
This project was developed collaboratively as part of EMU430 Data Analytics,
focusing on reproducible research, statistical exploration,
and higher education trend analysis.
</p>

</div>

<div class="contributors-wrapper">

<div class="contributor-row">

<div class="contributor-info">

<h3>Yusuf Bora Çavdar</h3>

<div class="contributor-role">
Lead Data Analysis · Visualization · Modeling
</div>

</div>

<a
href="https://github.com/"
target="_blank"
class="github-button">

GitHub →

</a>

</div>

<div class="row-divider"></div>

<div class="contributor-row">

<div class="contributor-info">

<h3>Onur Furkan Gök</h3>

<div class="contributor-role">
Research Design · Data Processing · Methodology
</div>

</div>

<a
href="https://github.com/"
target="_blank"
class="github-button">

GitHub →

</a>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<style>

.contributors-section {

  margin-top: 7rem;
  margin-bottom: 6rem;
}

.contributors-header {

  margin-bottom: 3.5rem;

  max-width: 760px;
}

.contributors-tag {

  display: inline-flex;

  align-items: center;

  padding: 8px 18px;

  border-radius: 999px;

  background:
    rgba(14,165,233,0.08);

  color:
    #0284c7;

  font-size: .8rem;

  font-weight: 700;

  letter-spacing: 1.2px;

  text-transform: uppercase;

  margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
}

.contributors-header h2 {

  font-size: 2.6rem;

  font-weight: 800;

  color: #0f172a;

  margin-bottom: 1.4rem;
}

.contributors-header p {

  font-size: 1.08rem;

  line-height: 2;

  color: #64748b;
}

.contributors-wrapper {

  background: white;

  border-radius: 32px;

  overflow: hidden;

  border:
    1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.10);

  box-shadow:
    0 14px 35px rgba(15,23,42,0.04);
}

.contributor-row {

  display: flex;

  align-items: center;

  justify-content: space-between;

  padding: 2.6rem 3rem;

  transition: .3s ease;
}

.contributor-row:hover {

  background:
    rgba(248,250,252,0.7);
}

.contributor-info h3 {

  font-size: 1.45rem;

  font-weight: 700;

  color: #0f172a;

  margin-bottom: .55rem;
}

.contributor-role {

  color: #64748b;

  font-size: 1rem;

  line-height: 1.8;
}

.github-button {

  text-decoration: none;

  display: inline-flex;

  align-items: center;

  justify-content: center;

  padding:
    14px 22px;

  border-radius: 14px;

  background:
    #0f172a;

  color: white;

  font-weight: 700;

  font-size: .95rem;

  transition:
    transform .25s ease,
    background .25s ease;
}

.github-button:hover {

  background:
    #0284c7;

  transform:
    translateY(-2px);
}

.row-divider {

  height: 1px;

  background:
    rgba(148,163,184,0.14);

  margin:
    0 3rem;
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {

  .contributors-header h2 {

    font-size: 2rem;
  }

  .contributor-row {

    flex-direction: column;

    align-items: flex-start;

    gap: 1.5rem;

    padding: 2rem;
  }

  .row-divider {

    margin: 0 2rem;
  }
}

</style>
